categories.name: National Emergency
categories.description: Use these for any life-threatening emergency anywhere in the Philippines.

hotlines.name: National Emergency Hotline
hotlines.description: Fire, medical, police — all emergencies. Call this first.

hotlines.name: Philippine National Police
hotlines.description: Police assistance, crime reporting, security threats.

hotlines.name: Bureau of Fire Protection
hotlines.description: Fire emergencies, fire investigation.

hotlines.name: Philippine Red Cross
hotlines.description: Disaster response, blood services, ambulance, rescue.

hotlines.name: DOH Health Emergency
hotlines.description: Health emergencies, disease outbreaks, poison control.

categories.name: Traffic & Road Assistance
categories.description: For road incidents, accidents, and traffic-related emergencies.

hotlines.name: MMDA Emergency
hotlines.description: Metro Manila traffic emergencies, road clearing, flood.

hotlines.name: Land Transportation Office
hotlines.description: Road accidents, vehicle concerns, license and registration issues.

hotlines.name: Traffic Management Center
hotlines.description: Metro Manila traffic coordination center.

categories.name: Expressway Operators
categories.description: Emergency and breakdown assistance on Philippine expressways.

hotlines.name: NLEX Emergency
hotlines.description: North Luzon Expressway — breakdowns, accidents, road assistance.

hotlines.name: SLEX / Skyway Emergency
hotlines.description: South Luzon Expressway and Metro Manila Skyway.

hotlines.name: SCTEX Emergency
hotlines.description: Subic-Clark-Tarlac Expressway emergency and breakdown.

hotlines.name: TPLEX Emergency
hotlines.description: Tarlac-Pangasinan-La Union Expressway emergency assistance.

hotlines.name: CAVITEX Assistance
hotlines.description: Cavite Expressway breakdown and road assistance.

categories.name: Disaster Response
categories.description: For coordination during and after natural disasters and calamities.

hotlines.name: NDRRMC Operations Center
hotlines.description: National disaster coordination, flood, typhoon, earthquake response.

hotlines.name: PAGASA Weather Hotline
hotlines.description: Weather forecasts, storm warnings, typhoon advisories.

hotlines.name: PHIVOLCS
hotlines.description: Earthquake and volcanic activity information.

categories.name: Key Medical Facilities
categories.description: Major government hospitals with 24/7 emergency departments.

hotlines.name: Philippine General Hospital
hotlines.description: Level 1 trauma center, emergency medical care, NCR.

hotlines.name: Philippine Heart Center
hotlines.description: Cardiac emergencies, heart attack, chest pain.

hotlines.name: Philippine Children's Medical Center
hotlines.description: Pediatric emergencies, children under 18.

hotlines.name: Lung Center of the Philippines
hotlines.description: Respiratory emergencies, lung conditions.
